title: VAST-AI-Research/SkinTokens GitHub Repository
permitted_uses: Technology evaluation for offline rigging and skin-weight generation in the OpenClinXR asset pipeline.
claims_supported: SkinTokens/TokenRig is presented as a learned compact representation and unified autoregressive rigging framework.
The repository describes generating a skeleton hierarchy and skin weights from an input 3D mesh.
The repository lists an MIT license.
The repository documents Python 3.11, CUDA 12.1, flash-attn, and an NVIDIA GPU with at least 14 GB memory as local inference prerequisites.
claims_not_supported: That SkinTokens is suitable for live Quest 3 runtime use.
That SkinTokens can run on the target Apple Silicon laptop without separate CUDA-capable infrastructure.
That SkinTokens output is production-ready without rig QA, retargeting, deformation tests, license/provenance checks, and Quest performance validation.
